title: MineMath
description: MineMath - Your Mathematical GUI Calculator Companion in Minecraft
body:
# 🧮 MineMath

**MineMath** is a simple and intuitive in-game calculator for Minecraft. MineMath lets you perform calculations directly inside the game — no need to tab out!

## Features

- **In-Game Calculator**: Perform basic math operations right from within Minecraft.
- **Keyboard Support**: Use your physical keyboard to input numbers and operations quickly.
- **Clean Interface**: A modern and user-friendly design for a seamless experience.
- **Customizable Keybinding**: Open the calculator with a key of your choice (default: `N`).
- **Multi-Platform Support**: Available for **Fabric**, **Forge**, and **NeoForge**.

## Demo

![Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Oiha-dev/MineMath/refs/heads/architectury-1.20.1/readme/demo.gif)

## How to Use

Simple... Just press `N` (or your chosen key) to open the calculator in-game!

## Need Help?

Join our community on Discord to get support, share feedback, or suggest new features:  [Join the Community](https://discord.gg/3D9TwmdPgh)
